prompt: On the screen, show TensorBoard with loss curves going up. Have the dad ask ‘Are you debugging or defining?’.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Modify the content displayed on the computer screen in front of the son to show a TensorBoard interface with loss curves visibly increasing. Additionally, replace the existing speech text from the dad on the left with: 'Are you debugging or defining?'
objects: Computer screen (in front of the son)
TensorBoard interface with loss curves visibly increasing (on the computer screen)
Speech text from dad: "Are you debugging or defining?" (on the left)
